message.content:
Thoroughly explore the DECODE app's branding, copy, and messaging. I need to understand how "DECODE" is currently presented throughout the codebase.

Search for:
1. All instances of "DECODE" text shown to users — in components, data files, help text
2. The tagline/subtitle ("Daily direction system" and any other taglines)
3. Onboarding slides — read the full content of `client/src/components/Onboarding.tsx`
4. Help page content — read `client/src/data/help.ts` for all user-facing descriptions
5. The splash screen, auth screen copy
6. Any motivational messages, greetings, or instructional text
7. The manifest.json for PWA metadata
8. The DailyChecklist greeting/motivational messages — read `client/src/components/DailyChecklist.tsx`
9. Coach endpoint prompt text in `src/routes.ts` (the AI coaching prompt that mentions DECODE)
10. The data files for tasks, sliders, profile options in `client/src/data/`

Report all the user-facing text/copy you find, organized by where it appears.

content.text: There's an issue with the selected model (claude-haiku-4-5@20251001). It may not exist or you may not have access to it. Run /model to pick a different model.
